title: Free Swimming Programme basic throughput data: October to December 2009
body: "Released: 5 February 2010  This statistical bulletin contains information on the number of free swims recorded by all 260 local authorities participating in the Free Swimming Programme.  About this release  Data in this release relate to the number of free swims for the third quarter of the Programme (1 October 2009 to 31 December 2009). These data are presented alongside the figures for the first two quarters of the Programme (1 April 2009 to 30 September 2009).  In addition to the number of free swims within each Local Authority, figures are also presented showing the number of free swims per 1,000 target population within each Local Authority.  Tables    Free Swims - April to December 09 XLS (353kb)  Free Swims - April to December 09 PDF (871kb)   Release notes    Free Swims - April to December 09: Release notes PDF (103kb)  Free Swims - April to December 09: Release notes Word (145kb)   top  Maps showing free swims per 1,000 target population Please click images or links to enlarge        Free Swims per 1,000 residents aged 16 and under Enlarge image    Free Swims per 1,000 residents 60 and over Enlarge image  top  Pre-release access The following officials and Ministers received privileged early access under the Official Statistics code of practice:  Ben Bradshaw MP, Secretary of State for Culture, Media & Sport Philip French, DCMS (Special Advisor) Linda Martin DCMS (Head of News) John Evans, DCMS (Press Office) Relwyn Reffell, DCMS (Policy) Michael Cooke, DCMS (Researcher)  Andy Burnham MP, Secretary of State for Health Peter Graham, DH (Press Office) Kay Thomson, DH (Policy)  Rosie Winterton MP, Minister for Local Government  Elisabeth Adlington, CLG (Press Office) Stuart Macleod, CLG (Policy)  Angela Eagle MP, Minister of State for Pensions and Ageing Society Ed Price, DWP (policy)  Alison Clarke, DWP (Press Office)  Iain Wright MP, Parliamentary Under-Secretary of State for 14-19 Reform and Apprenticeships  Ian Broadbridge, DCSF (Policy) Oliver Lane, DCSF (Press Office)  Phil Smith, Sport England (Director of Sport) Peter Dickinson, Sport England (Head of Press and PR) David Meli, Sport England (Policy) "
